title: Use Seeds for repo-local issue tracking
rationale: This repository now initializes .seeds/ so future work can be tracked with project-local issues and dependencies instead of relying on ad hoc notes alone.

name: Seeds init adds union merge attributes
description: Initializing Seeds adds .gitattributes entries for .seeds/issues.jsonl, .seeds/templates.jsonl, and .seeds/plans.jsonl with merge=union so project-local issue tracking files merge cleanly in git.
